Metadata.Changelog:
New Xeno version 1.2.75
Adaptation to future versions
Multithreaded attach safety and speed improvements
Server handling improvements
Better WebSocket client handling and fixes
getcustomasset improvement
Better Xeno cache system handler
Fixed Xeno sometimes freezing while attaching to certain versions
Improved performance of crypographic functions in C
More efficient memory management and better allocation handling

New Xeno version 1.2.80
Adaptation and stability update for future Roblox versions

Cloudflare Ray ID: 9a08a598fd155992 • Your IP: 44.212.43.183 • Performance & security by Cloudflare

No more crashes when attaching in-game or on menu
Better requests library with proper OpenSSL integration & fixed not supporting ports
Faster C loadstring function with better memory optimization
Better getscriptbytecode with proper sanitization for all scripts and fixed not able to view scripts with run context client
Better Xeno caching service with all info's being cached so everything can be resumed if Xeno is reopened
Optimized auto execute with all scripts being separate and with auto handling
Revamped queue_on_teleport with now better functionality, proper serialization with Xeno caching
Optimized execution function adapting to multiple thread with better checking to ensure stability
Fixed a lot of the UI text showing "Roblox" when attaching in-game
Fixed not being attached after leaving while attaching in-game, always stays attached
Revamped in-game attach with better checks
Added back function 'Xeno.getinstanceaddress' 
Revamped function 'Xeno.hookinstance'
Added new setting option "Redirect errors to Xeno console"
Added new setting option "Redirect output to Xeno console"
